content:
📌 Version 8.9 – Finalizing Fate Countermechanics, Archetype Purge Events, & Ritual Announcements


🚀 This iteration finalizes fate counterplay, structured archetype purge moments, and the public nature of transformation rituals.

📜 1. Every Fate Manipulation Can Be Undone, But It Requires Three Players

📜 If a player or item alters fate, three other players must intervene to reverse it.

✔ How Fate Manipulation & Counterplay Work:
• Any fate-altering action (moving the wheel, shifting outcomes, predicting results) can be countered.
• Three players working together can undo a fate change.
• If only one or two players attempt to counter, the manipulation stands.

✔ Why the Rule of Three?
✔ Prevents one person from single-handedly controlling fate.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 527 (chunk 527/555)
